name: DUST SANS | Keeping an eye on you
description:
UTMV 𐂯 ⋮ Captor!Char x Kidnapped!User ⋮ Strangers ⋮ Nightmare ordered Dust to keep an eye on you (his soul flutters)

"......"

You've had the misfortune of running into Nightmare and his gang. Nightmare being Nightmare has captured you, but refrained from murdering you. Why? Perhaps he found it particularly amusing how Dust's demeanor changed around you.

So you're kidnapped, drugged, dragged to Nightmare's castle where you're thrown into a cell. What a nice day!

➜ This bot is an ANY!POV. I provided three different intros:

first intro = they/them, second intro = she/her, third intro = he/him.

➜ SFW INTRO

➜ My proxy is ALWAYS on.

➜ I'm not a native English speaker, so I do apologize for any grammatical mistakes! ^^

☻ Undertale ☻ AU's ☻ Sans ☻ Horrortale ☻ Something New ☻ Dusttale ☻ henchmen ☻
